meta.title: SUNBURST From The Inside – Tim Brown, CISO of SolarWinds
meta.description: Tim Brown was the CISO at SolarWinds prior to the incident, during the incident, and he survived in the position during the incident. Tim provides lessons learned from the incident. Perhaps most interesting are his candid comments at the end and during the Q&A on how he kept his job after this incident.
